positive: A cozy, isometric illustration of a perfect breakfast scene: a stack of pancakes drizzled with syrup, a cup of steaming coffee, and a small bowl of berries, set on a rustic wooden table. Warm, inviting light, Pixar animation style, highly appetizing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, abstract, harsh lighting, unsettling
